steps.title: Identify what the blank must express
steps.content: The sentence says the speed difference "is largely ______ of the fact that…" The blank must name the relationship between the speed difference and its cause. The speed difference is the result of the aerodynamic vs. terrestrial feature constraint — so the blank needs a word meaning “result” or “effect.”

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — a repudiation: Repudiation means a rejection or denial. The speed difference does not reject or deny the fact about aerodynamic features — it arises from it. Wrong relationship. ✗
  • Choice B — an explanation: If the speed difference were an explanation of the fact, the speed difference would be causing or accounting for the aerodynamic constraint — but the logic runs the other way: the constraint causes the speed difference. This reverses the cause-and-effect direction. ✗
  • Choice C — an objective: Objective means a goal or aim. A speed difference is not something the lion or swift is trying to achieve; it is simply the outcome of physical features. ✗
  • Choice D — a consequence: Consequence means a result or effect of a prior cause. The speed difference is the effect of the fact that aerodynamic features impose less speed restriction than terrestrial running features. The causal direction is correct. ✓
D is correct.
